allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); devices=d.get\(''''devices'''',[]\); [print\(x.get\(''''productName'''',''''?''''\), x.get\(''''code'''',''''?''''\), x.get\(''''deviceSource'''',''''?''''\)\) for x in devices if ''''rex'''' in x.get\(''''productName'''',''''''''\).lower\(\) or ''''rex'''' in x.get\(''''code'''',''''''''\).lower\(\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''country:'''', d.get\(''''countryCode'''',''''?''''\)\); print\(''''email/id:'''', d.get\(''''email'''', d.get\(''''userId'''', d.get\(''''accountId'''', ''''?''''\)\)\)\)")
